forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,40 @@
+---
+assignees:
+- claude-code
+depends_on:
+- 01KTCADKCJT9WEW123VYTFZZZH
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: '8280'
+project: card-comments
+title: Define comments field YAML and add it to the task entity
+---
+## What
+Declare the `comments` field as builtin field-definition data and attach it to the task entity, following the data-driven YAML pattern used by every existing field (see `crates/swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/definitions/attachments.yaml` and `scheduled.yaml`, and how `attachments` is listed in `crates/swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/entities/task.yaml`).
+
+Files:
+1. Create `crates/swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/definitions/comments.yaml`:
+   - `id`: next sentinel builtin id (zero-padded, sorts before real ULIDs — pick the next free code after the existing ones; `created` is `...013`, check the highest in `builtin/definitions/` and increment).
+   - `name: comments`
+   - `description: Conversation log`
+   - `type: { kind: comment-log }` (the variant added in the dependency task)
+   - `icon: message-square` (Lucide)
+   - `editor: comment-log`, `display: comment-log` (explicit, matching the inferred values)
+   - `section: footer` (sits with attachments at the bottom of the inspector, after Dates/System)
+   - no `sort`/`groupable` (a log is not a grid column)
+2. Edit `crates/swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/entities/task.yaml`: add `comments` to the `fields:` list (place it near `attachments`, in the `footer` section). Do NOT add a new section — reuse `footer`.
+
+Confirm the builtin definitions are loaded dynamically (include_dir/codegen) so a new YAML file is picked up without a hardcoded list — verify there is no manual registry listing the definition filenames. If one exists, add `comments` to it.
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+- [ ] `comments.yaml` exists with a unique sentinel id and `kind: comment-log`.
+- [ ] `task.yaml` lists `comments` in its fields.
+- [ ] A board initialized from builtins exposes a `comments` field on the `task` entity schema with editor/display `comment-log` and section `footer`.
+- [ ] No duplicate or colliding sentinel id with any other file in `builtin/definitions/`.
+
+## Tests
+- [ ] Add a test in the kanban crate (alongside existing schema/defaults tests — see `crates/swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/defaults.rs` and `schema.rs` test modules) that loads the builtin task entity definition and asserts the `comments` field is present with `effective_editor()=="comment-log"`, `effective_display()=="comment-log"`, and `section=="footer"`.
+- [ ] Add a test asserting all builtin definition sentinel ids are unique (guards against id collision).
+- [ ] `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-kanban` — green.
+
+## Workflow
+- Use `/tdd` — write the schema-load assertion test first (it fails until the YAML exists), then add the YAML.
\ No newline at end of file

forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -11,28 +11,28 @@
 ## What
 Declare the `comments` field as builtin field-definition data and attach it to the task entity, following the data-driven YAML pattern used by every existing field (see `crates/swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/definitions/attachments.yaml` and `scheduled.yaml`, and how `attachments` is listed in `crates/swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/entities/task.yaml`).

+Builtin definitions are loaded dynamically via `include_dir!` (`crates/swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/defaults.rs:28` — `BUILTIN_DEFINITIONS`), merged with local `.kanban/definitions/` overrides. CONFIRMED: there is no manual filename registry, so a new YAML file is picked up automatically.
+
 Files:
 1. Create `crates/swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/definitions/comments.yaml`:
-   - `id`: next sentinel builtin id (zero-padded, sorts before real ULIDs — pick the next free code after the existing ones; `created` is `...013`, check the highest in `builtin/definitions/` and increment).
+   - `id: "00000000000000000000000018"` — the next free sentinel id. CONFIRMED the current highest in `builtin/definitions/` is `...17` (status_date); `...16` is completed. Use `...18`. (Sentinel ids are zero-padded and sort before real ULIDs; the last two chars are the builtin field code.)
    - `name: comments`
    - `description: Conversation log`
    - `type: { kind: comment-log }` (the variant added in the dependency task)
    - `icon: message-square` (Lucide)
    - `editor: comment-log`, `display: comment-log` (explicit, matching the inferred values)
-   - `section: footer` (sits with attachments at the bottom of the inspector, after Dates/System)
+   - `section: footer` (sits with attachments at the bottom of the inspector; `footer` already exists in task.yaml's sections list — do NOT add a new section)
    - no `sort`/`groupable` (a log is not a grid column)
-2. Edit `crates/swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/entities/task.yaml`: add `comments` to the `fields:` list (place it near `attachments`, in the `footer` section). Do NOT add a new section — reuse `footer`.
-
-Confirm the builtin definitions are loaded dynamically (include_dir/codegen) so a new YAML file is picked up without a hardcoded list — verify there is no manual registry listing the definition filenames. If one exists, add `comments` to it.
+2. Edit `crates/swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/entities/task.yaml`: add `comments` to the `fields:` list. Place it next to `attachments` (line ~304). Both belong to the `footer` section.

 ## Acceptance Criteria
-- [ ] `comments.yaml` exists with a unique sentinel id and `kind: comment-log`.
+- [ ] `comments.yaml` exists with id `...18` and `kind: comment-log`.
 - [ ] `task.yaml` lists `comments` in its fields.
 - [ ] A board initialized from builtins exposes a `comments` field on the `task` entity schema with editor/display `comment-log` and section `footer`.
-- [ ] No duplicate or colliding sentinel id with any other file in `builtin/definitions/`.
+- [ ] No duplicate sentinel id with any other file in `builtin/definitions/`.

 ## Tests
-- [ ] Add a test in the kanban crate (alongside existing schema/defaults tests — see `crates/swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/defaults.rs` and `schema.rs` test modules) that loads the builtin task entity definition and asserts the `comments` field is present with `effective_editor()=="comment-log"`, `effective_display()=="comment-log"`, and `section=="footer"`.
+- [ ] Add a test in the kanban crate (alongside existing schema/defaults tests — see `crates/swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/defaults.rs` and `schema.rs` test modules) that loads the builtin task entity definition and asserts the `comments` field is present with `effective_editor()==\"comment-log\"`, `effective_display()==\"comment-log\"`, and `section==\"footer\"`.
 - [ ] Add a test asserting all builtin definition sentinel ids are unique (guards against id collision).
 - [ ] `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-kanban` — green.
